name: compliance source contract validator rejects a why_authoritative field with fewer than three lines
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources:\n  - {id: x, name: x, url: x, authoritative_publisher: x, jurisdiction: x, applicable_to: [x], identifier_scheme: x, why_authoritative: "single line only", fetch_frequency: weekly, legal_review_required: false, paywalled: false}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-source-contract.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'why_authoritative_too_short' err.txt && grep -q 'lines_required>=3' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
